issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Installation script uses curl piped to bash without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Cost-cutting log pipeline: filter noise, sample info, archive to S3, route errors to Slack
scenarios.rationale: Baseline pieces together generic filter/sample/sink TOML but tends to miss the exclude-on-error sample pattern, rate-limit on the Slack sink, and gzip-archive sizing, while treatment uses the skill's exact filter_noise/sample/s3_archive/slack_errors stanzas.

scenarios.name: VRL transform: parse JSON, redact email, geoip-enrich country, normalize severity
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes valid parse_json/if-else VRL but commonly invents geoip function names or uses del on email instead of the redact() builtin, while treatment uses get_enrichment_table_record and the exact redact() signature from the skill.
